value.string: REQUIRED: Fill in the Bot Name and Vendor Name fields in the lines below . These values are used for logging purposes.
Verify Bot Name and Vendor Name

Bot Name and Vendor Name will drive logging - and are required to be filled. Additionaly, these values should be passed to a subtask (if subtasks are expected) or passed from a parent task if this bot will be called as a subtask.
Bot Name and Vendor Name are required values - please provide their values using the value assignments on the preceding lines.
Bot logging root set by default to logging location used by the bot agent. See the variables pane for sRootLogDirectory.
Creating default log/error directories specific to this bot
Creating file if it doesnt previously exist so that the header row can be created
Setting lookback period for how long to keep logs for. Default is 30, can be customized as desired.
Surrounding delete actions in try handlers as to not cause the bot to fail its run in the case a log file couldnt be deleted.
Deleting all files from logs folder older than nLoggingPeriod days since last modification
Deleting all files from snapshots folder older than nLoggingPeriod days since last modification
Creating file if it doesnt previously exist so that the header row can be created
Logging error to file matching header row established format
Taking snapshot. Please disable/remove this action if your screen could potential contain plain text PII
Create log folder/log file, if not present
Check if Telegram Bot Token is present
Telegram Bot Token Not Found! Please input the bot token.
Check if Telegram Chat ID is present
Telegram Chat ID Not Found! Please input the Chat ID.
Check if Telegram Message Text is present
Telegram Message text Not Found! Please input the Text Message.

Error Sending Telegram message.
Check error log for troubleshooting.

This bot will end now.

Telegram message successfully sent!

This bot will end now.

variables.description: A variable you can use for assignments
variables.name: prompt-assignment

variables.description: Root directory for creating bot logs - can be customized or left as default
variables.name: sRootLogDirectory

variables.description: Bot Specific Error Folder within Logging Root Directory
variables.name: sErrorFolder

variables.description: REQUIRED: Bot Name (as listed in Bot Store) of the submitted Bot - doesn't have to match the file name of bot itself
variables.name: sBotName

variables.description: REQUIRED: Vendor Name as listed in Bot Store submission
variables.name: sVendorName

variables.description: Log Folder Location for Bot Specific Logs
variables.name: sLogFolder

variables.description: Snapshot folder for Bot Specific Snapshots
variables.name: sSnapshotsFolder

variables.description: Error Line Number as returned by the Catch Error Handler
variables.name: nErrorLineNumber

variables.description: String representation of the Error Line Number returned by the Catch Error Handler
variables.name: sErrorLineNumber

variables.description: Current Date used for Logging Purposes
variables.name: sCurrentDate

variables.description: Current Date/Time for use inside of Logging files
variables.name: sDateTime

window.name: ESPN: Serving sports fans. Anytime. Anywhere. - Internet Explorer

variables.description: Empty value to check for the presence of empty strings
variables.name: sNull

defaultValue.string: Default Message. Overwrite this message by setting the input variable 'sMessageText'.
